paper.title: DeskCraft: Benchmarking Desktop Agents on Professional Workflows and Human-in-the-Loop Collaboration

checks: The arXiv Atom record resolves specifically to immutable 2606.03103v1, records the nine-author byline and cs.AI category, and contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
pdfinfo identifies a readable, unencrypted 42-page PDF 1.7 document with the complete title and author metadata.

The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from the title, abstract, benchmark definition, construction, experiments, appendices, representative cases, research-assistant disclosure, and artifact-license statement through manuscript page 42.

The extraction preserves the 538-task frame, 386/152 standard/interactive split, L1/L2/L3 definitions, three trigger types, user-simulator description, execution-based verification, configured-agent experiment, result tables, task-source tables, construction details, and case analyses needed by the queued review.

The immutable arXiv source archive passes gzip/tar inventory checks and contains 62 regular files, including the TeX manuscript, bibliography, style files, result-table fragments, figures, and case images.
warnings: The layout-preserving extraction interleaves two-column text and may split figure labels or hyphenated words; use the PDF or TeX source for page-precise claims.

The operating-system file utility reports the PDF as 16 pages from its shallow signature scan, while pdfinfo and the extracted page markers consistently report 42 pages; the provenance uses pdfinfo's 42-page count.

paper_time_boundary.selection_basis: This is the newest public commit in the current main-branch history at or before the immutable v1 submission timestamp.
paper_time_boundary.inspection: The paper-time public tree contains only LICENSE. It does not contain tasks, assets, evaluators, runners, model configurations, prompts, trajectories, judgments, result tables, or analysis code. It therefore cannot be treated as the paper-time empirical implementation.

acquisition_head_boundary.commit_message: Add task loader, VM proxy support, and QC/repair tooling.

duplicate_task_ids.note: The two records have the same instruction and ID but are present under both L1 and L2 directory labels.
The two records have the same instruction and ID but are present under both L1 and L2 directory labels.

acquisition_head_boundary.release_result_boundary: No run-level trajectories, model outputs, judgment corpus, or results/ directory was found in the complete 3,302-member acquisition archive. The current release supplies task packages, assets, evaluator code, runners, prompts/configuration code, and documentation, but it does not by itself reproduce the paper's reported 18-agent result tables or repeated-run analyses.

official_release.timing_warning: The current acquisition snapshot is not paper-time code. Its latest commit explicitly adds QC/repair tooling and task fixes, while the only public paper-time commit contains just the license. Release inspection must therefore be separated from claims about the exact implementation or task bytes used for the immutable v1 experiments.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF and source archive, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified readable coverage through the final page, archived the identifiable paper-time public commit and the queued acquisition HEAD, inventoried both archives, parsed all 538 current-release task records, and inspected core interaction/release files. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, reproduction, benchmark execution, or evidence of human collaboration, occupational representativeness, professional validity, capability, safety, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use the immutable v1 PDF/text/TeX source for paper claims. Audit the current release at commit 923f87955ad067ffbcc9c1f05bf8cfd9c3a1b714 as a 30-day-post-v1 artifact, not as exact paper-time code. Preserve the release-result absence and the two duplicate task-ID findings, and verify standard/interactive denominators, simulator authority, trigger realization, invalid-environment policy, repeated-run subset, and paper/release result correspondence before making evaluation claims.
local_storage_note: The PDF, arXiv source archive, and two official release archives are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable/pinned URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
